# Capital Direct Funding, Inc.
> Private lending company providing fast, flexible funding for California real estate

## Company Overview
Capital Direct Funding, Inc. (CDF) is a family-run private lending company headquartered in West Covina, California. Founded by Frank Williams, CDF provides asset-based private lending solutions for real estate borrowers and whole-note first trust deed investments for accredited investors across California.

- Website: https://capitaldf.com
- Phone: (626) 796-1680
- Email: info@capitaldf.com
- Address: 100 N Citrus St, Suite 530, West Covina, CA 91791
- DRE License: 01885595
- NMLS: 1159831
- Broker of Record: Juan Williams

## Key Facts
- Over $200M in deployed capital
- 500+ funded transactions across California
- Close loans in as few as 7 days
- Loan amounts: $50,000 - $5,000,000
- Rates starting at 8.50%
- Investor yields: 8.95% - 10.95%

## Loan Programs
- Fix & Flip Loans: Up to 75% ARV, rates from 9.99%, 6-18 month terms, $100K-$3M
- Bridge Loans: Up to 70% LTV, rates from 9.99%, 6-24 month terms, $100K-$5M
- Ground-Up Construction: Up to 65% completed value, rates from 10.99%, 12-24 months, $250K-$5M
- Cash-Out Refinance: Up to 65% LTV, rates from 9.99%, 12-36 months, $100K-$3M
- Probate & Estate Loans: Up to 65% LTV, rates from 10.99%, 6-24 months, $100K-$3M
- Foreclosure & Bankruptcy Recovery: Up to 60% LTV, rates from 11.99%, 6-24 months, $100K-$2M
- Self-Employed Solutions: Up to 70% LTV, rates from 9.99%, 6-36 months, $100K-$3M
- ADU Construction Loans: 75-85% LTC, rates 9.5-11%, 12-18 months, $60K-$300K

## For Investors
CDF offers whole-note, first trust deed investments secured by California real estate. Each investment is individually selected and personally underwritten. Conservative LTV ratios and rigorous underwriting protect investor capital.

## Specializations
CDF specializes in complex lending situations where traditional banks cannot help:
- Probate and estate sales
- Foreclosure bail-outs
- Post-bankruptcy financing
- Self-employed borrowers (no tax returns required)
- Foreign national financing
- ADU construction financing
- Cross-collateralization
- Partnership and divorce buyouts

## Service Area
All of California, with concentration in Los Angeles County, Orange County, San Bernardino County, Riverside County, and San Diego County.
